case_title: TIPTON MANAGEMENT COMPANY, INC. vs. PHILLIPS, IAN et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TIPTON MANAGEMENT COMPANY, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT PHILLIPS, IAN GRAY, ADRIAN SUMMONS ISSUED
